title: Course nav rail (Kelas lesson sidebar)
description: CourseNav — a compact secondary-sidebar syllabus nav (modules→lessons + per-lesson completion, current lesson highlighted) shown beside the Kelas lesson sheet. DERIVED client-side from courses.getOverview + progress.getCourseProgress; no new tables/convex, no routes. The former Silabus⇄Roadmap 'quest trail' presentation (CourseRoadmap/RoadmapNode) was removed in 0.3.0 — it duplicated the Silabus overview (DRY).

kelas: KelasCourse lesson open: <CourseNav tenantId courseSlug lessonHref overviewHref currentLessonId> is the secondary-sidebar nav rail beside the LessonPlayerView sheet (flat module→lesson list, current lesson highlighted)
